law: This sample code project provides examples of how to use the StoreKit Test framework to test individual units of an implementation.
In the sample code, use the same value everywhere that the ad network identifier is required.
In the testing environment, this value is always .
In the sample code, use the private key when you generate a signature, and use the public key when you call .
All of the properties are required.
In the testing environment, the is always .
